title: 9 Managing Payor/Payee Records on PaymentStream AFT
body_text:
9	Managing Payor/Payee Records on PaymentStream AFT
9.1	Overview of Managing Payor/Payee Records on PaymentStream AFT
Payor/payee records contain the data used to create AFT transactions. This information applies to the Data Entry Automatic Release and Data Entry Manual Release service types on
PaymentStreamâ¢
AFT.
9.2	Managing Payor/Payee Records on PaymentStream AFT
In the Data Entry Manual Release and the Data Entry Automatic Release service types, financial institutions use
PaymentStream
AFT to add, delete, and modify payor/payee records for their Originators. Business members can add, delete, and modify records for their own Originators. For procedures on managing payor/payee records, see
PaymentStream
AFT â Guide for Automatic Release, Form 5598, and
PaymentStream
AFT â Guide for Manual Release, Form 5599.
